description: Fostering discovery, access, use, and quality of high-value data and machine intelligence.
highlights: Developed open-source packages for delivery of standard metadata over APIs.
Integrated data with LLMs and agents to create high-value digital commodities.
Participating in CODATA CDIF, DRUM, and MLCommons Croissant working groups.

description: Collaborated with Postman Open Technologies to automate data publication.
highlights: Automated publication of high-value data through the Postman platform.
Developed fully documented, data-centric collections in Postman.

description: Led development of metadata-driven data infrastructure globally.
highlights: Launched RDS (Rich Data Services) and Ariā platforms.
Established secure data portals for NSF, CBE, and national statistical offices.
Partnered with global agencies to advance metadata standards.

description: Information processing and data-centric projects for international organizations.
highlights: Major contributor to DDI Codebook and Lifecycle standards.
Developed the Africa Household Survey Databank.
Member of the team that launched the International Household Survey Network (IHSN).
